hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'styles.scss'; then npx sass /Users/hugues/Projects/todo/todo-manager/css/styles.scss /Users/hugues/Projects/todo/todo-manager/css/styles.css --style=expanded --no-source-map && osascript -e 'display notification "SCSS compilé avec succès" with title "Todo Manager" sound name "Glass"' || osascript -e 'display notification "Erreur de compilation SCSS" with title "Todo Manager" sound name "Basso"'; fi
